metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for staged, evidence-driven audits of zero-knowledge systems and cryptographic protocols.

plugins.name: core-audit-flow
plugins.description: Core audit orchestration: router, context builder, spec-delta checker, false-positive verification, report writer, and shared severity/evidence framework.

plugins.name: zk-and-vm-auditors
plugins.description: Domain auditors for ZK circuit languages and virtual machines: generic ZK circuits, Cairo/Starknet, Noir, zkVM (SP1/RISC Zero/Valida), and gnark.

plugins.name: crypto-primitive-auditors
plugins.description: Domain auditors for cryptographic primitives: elliptic curves, pairings, BLS, hash functions, polynomial commitments, Merkle trees, Fiat-Shamir transcripts, and encryption schemes.

plugins.name: protocol-auditors
plugins.description: Domain auditors for cryptographic protocols: DKG/threshold signatures (FROST, MuSig2), MPC (garbled circuits, OT), and VDFs (Wesolowski, Pietrzak).

plugins.name: post-quantum-auditors
plugins.description: Domain auditors for post-quantum and advanced encryption: lattice-based schemes (LWE/RLWE) and fully homomorphic encryption (FHE).

plugins.name: implementation-safety
plugins.description: Cross-cutting implementation safety auditors: Rust crypto safety, side-channel analysis, and dependency hygiene.

plugins.name: evidence-and-tooling
plugins.description: Evidence collection and verification tooling: zkbugs vulnerability index, Kani harness generation, cargo-fuzz target generation, and formal verification bridge. Kani/fuzz/formal-verification skills are user-triggered only.
